articles.description: As Arsenal pursue a first Premier League title in 22 years, BBC Sport looks at how the relationship between Mikel Arteta and his assistant, Gabriel Heinze, is helping them.
articles.title: Gabriel Heinze: The big brother helping Mikel Arteta to get Arsenal over the line

articles.description: Uefa is seriously concerned that the Premier League's new financial rules could further impact competitive balance.
articles.title: Uefa fears impact of new Premier League spending rules

articles.description: Brentford are beaten by West Ham on penalties as Dango Ouattara is left to rue a missed Panenka. Is there ever a right rime to take one?
articles.title: Is there a right time for a Panenka - as Brentford pay the price?

articles.description: Britain's Sonay Kartal shows her "fighter" spirit to stun former Australian Open champion Madison Keys in the third round at Indian Wells.
articles.title: Indian Wells: Sonay Kartal stuns Madison Keys in comeback win

articles.description: Former US Open champion Gary Woodland says he "can't waste energy any more" hiding his struggles with post-traumatic stress disorder.
articles.title: Gary Woodland: Former US Open champion says he 'can't waste energy' hiding PTSD struggles

articles.description: BBC Sport F1 correspondent Andrew Benson answers your questions following the season-opening Australian Grand Prix.
articles.title: F1 Q&A: Can McLaren compete or will they be best of the rest?

articles.description: Jack Draper will continue his Indian Wells defence against Novak Djokovic while Cameron Norrie also claims a third-round win on Monday.
articles.title: Indian Wells: Jack Draper to face Novak Djokovic in fourth round while Cameron Norrie also through

articles.description: Despite Para-ice hockey being a 'mixed' event at the Winter Paralympics, just one female player will compete at Milan-Cortina.
articles.title: Winter Paralympics 2026: The 'mixed' team event with one woman

articles.description: Travis Kelce will return for another season with the Kansas City Chiefs, who have also agreed a deal to sign Kenneth Walker, according to reports.
articles.title: NFL: Travis Kelce to play 14th season for Kansas City Chiefs, who agree to sign Kenneth Walker

articles.description: Paul Scholes says an Instagram story post about Manchester United interim head coach Michael Carrick was "in no way intended to be offensive" towards his former team-mate.
articles.title: Manchester United: Paul Scholes did not intend to offend Michael Carrick
